programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
programme.desc: A Comedy About Old Friends In New Positions. A Good Old-Fashioned Orgy is about a close group of 30-somethings who spend every weekend of the summer throwing elaborate parties at the house belonging to group member Eric in the Hamptons.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: Killing Gunther
programme.desc: A dysfunctional team of young assassins set out to make a name for themselves by killing the most notorious hitman of all time, Gunther (Arnold Schwarzenegger).

programme.title: Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: A flying squirrel shows a youthful reindeer who suffers from vertigo how to soar into the sky. The reindeer heads to the North pole to save Santa and his reindeer.

programme.title: My Christmas Fiancé
programme.desc: A part-time student at a resort restaurant in beautiful Italy is hired by her boss to pose as his fiancée for the holidays, so he can avoid getting married.

programme.title: The Kindness of Strangers
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale of love and life, from the acclaimed director of AN EDUCATION and THEIR FINEST.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Carol!
programme.desc: Carol is one of Chicago's most successful book publishers and a ruthless businesswoman. Her staff hates her, Fred is secretly organizing a revolt and they all wish that the founder Eve was still alive and the company was run again by someone who appreciates books instead of wanting to make money.

programme.title: Santa Claws
programme.desc: Tommy leaves his kittens out for Santa to take back to the North Pole, but after a major allergic reaction Santa can't deliver presents anymore, so the kittens have to deliver the rest of the presents to all the boys and girls.

programme.title: Danger Close: The Battle Of Long Tan
programme.desc: (2019) War drama with Travis Fimmel. Outnumbered and outgunned, a band of 108 inexperienced Australian and New Zealand soldiers hold off 2,500 enemy troops during a downpour in Vietnam.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: (2003) War drama with Corbin Allred. After a Nazi ambush leaves them trapped behind enemy lines, a small band of soldiers discover a secret that could change the war - if they can make it out alive...

programme.title: Alone We Fight
programme.desc: A small band of American solders in World War Two venture behind enemy lines to try and stop the German advance from breaking through the Allied lines. Starring Corbin Bernsen (2018)

programme.title: HELL RIVER
programme.desc: Yugoslavian freedom fighters clash with the Nazis that invaded their homeland.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: (1967) WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Nothing Like the Holidays
programme.desc: The far-flung members of the Rodriguez family converge at their parents' home to face what may be their last Christmas together in this heart-warming holiday comedy.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: When ex-Government agent Luke Wright exposes the Russian mafia for rigging an illegal fight, they seek revenge on his family and threaten to kill anyone close to him.

programme.title: Into The Blue 2: The Reef
programme.desc: Free-spirited scuba divers Sebastion and Dani run a modest diving company in Hawaii. The young couple is delighted when they're hired by mysterious jet-setters who are searching for sunken treasure and will pay big money for diving help.

programme.title: Final Kill
programme.desc: An aging protection specialist takes on one last job before retirement, protecting a couple who stole eight million dollars from a ruthless crime family.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Teenager Megan Walsh (Hailee Steinfeld, Ender's Game) is a special ops agent who yearns for a normal adolescence. After faking her own death she assumes the role of an exchange student at a typical American high school, only to find that surviving here is harder than international espionage!

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After moving into a cottage together, two young lovers confront the horrors of a forgotten childhood.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Born heroes? Not these guys. Three inept night watchmen, aided by a young rookie and a fearless tabloid journalist, fight an epic battle to save their lives. A mistaken warehouse delivery unleashes a horde of hungry vampires, and these unlikely heroes must not only save themselves but also stop the scourge that threatens to take over the city of Baltimore.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Entrusted with a secret and believing the town's mixed race outcast, Jasper, to be innocent of the murder of a young girl, 14 year-old Charlie Bucktin embarks on a dangerous journey to find the true killer. Set over the scorching summer holidays of 1969, Charlie defeats the local racists, faces the breakup of his parents and falls head over heels in love as he discovers what it means to be truly courageous.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Prisoners
programme.desc: A desperate father resorts to increasingly drastic measures to find his missing daughter.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Drive Hard
programme.desc: A former race car driver (Thomas Jane) is abducted by a mysterious thief (John Cusack) and forced to be the wheel-man for a crime that puts them both in the sights of the cops and the mob who are determined to catch them, dead or alive.

programme.title: Prevenge
programme.desc: A pitch black, wryly British comedy from the mind of Alice Lowe, Prevenge follows Ruth, a pregnant woman on a killing spree. It's her misanthropic unborn baby dictating Ruth's actions, holding society responsible for the absence of a father. Struggling with her strain of prepartum madness, Ruth must ultimately choose between redemption and destruction at the moment of motherhood.

programme.title: I Know Who Killed Me
programme.desc: An idyllic small town is rocked when Aubrey Fleming (Lindsay Lohan), a bright and promising young college student is abducted and tortured by a sadistic serial killer. When she manages to escape, the traumatised girl who regains consciousness in the hospital insists that her identity is that of Dakota Moss a stripper in a seedy club and that the real Aubrey Fleming is still in mortal danger. A taut and gripping erotic thriller with a captivating riddle at its centre, I Know Who Killed Me explores the dark side of identity, sexuality and obsession.

programme.title: Drive Hard
programme.desc: A former race car driver (Thomas Jane) is abducted by a mysterious thief (John Cusack) and forced to be the wheel-man for a crime that puts them both in the sights of the cops and the mob who are determined to catch them, dead or alive.

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlacKkKlansman, this thrilling crime caper is based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 Stockholm bank heist. Outlaw Lars takes two workers hostage and demands his friend is released from prison, $1 million and a getaway car. As negotiations reach deadlock, hostage Bianca becomes strangely attracted to her captor.

programme.title: Black Friday
programme.desc: Overworked, underpaid and ready for the apocalypse. It's the biggest sale of the year and this time round the shoppers are out of their mind and out for blood. Fighting for their lives a misfit group of employees including shop manager Jonathan (Bruce Campbell - Evil Dead) find themselves fighting for survival against shoppers on a murderous rampage. Also starring Devon Sawa (Chucky the Series).

programme.title: Killer Weekend
programme.desc: From FrightFest Presents. The Inbetweeners meets Shaun of the Dead in this bloody and epic weekender comedy. Sam is going on a zombie survival paintball weekend for his stag and he couldn't be more chuffed! But the fun soon turns into a nightmare, leaving the party holed up in a disused nuclear bunker. The film injects new blood in British horror comedy with its mix of zombies and NSFW moments.

programme.title: The Bunker
programme.desc: This nighmareish horror will have you running towards the nearest exit. When Ella (Mischa Barton) discovers her Wall Street banker boyfriend is renting a secret storage unit, she becomes suspicious. Breaking in with her friend Molly (Emily Atack) they discover something sinister. Now trapped in the darkened building with a bunch of neurotic strangers, they must fight for their lives. Unmissable!

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Kimberley Crossman. A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival - but will love also be written in the stars?

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Married
programme.desc: (2019) Romance starring Jocelyn Hudon. Wedding planner Billie is hired to save a couple's relationship. Will falling for the groom's brother rewrite the itinerary?

programme.title: Lead With Your Heart
programme.desc: (2015) Drama starring William Baldwin. When their parents' marriage hits the rocks, two teenagers team up to hatch a daring plan to keep the family together.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Autumn Reeser. A workaholic wellness mogul goes on a retreat in Montana, where she discovers that slowing down might just be the key to finding inner peace - and love.

programme.title: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: (2020) Romance starring Taylor Cole. A professional matchmaker is tasked with matchmaking a perpetually single man to boost her company's profile. Could the perfect match be right in front of them?

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Almost Love
programme.desc: Adam and Marklin's 5-year relationship has gone from a passionate flame to a simmer, forcing them to reconcile with each other's shortcomings while their friends endlessly search for love in New York City.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Christmas Together
programme.desc: A woman leaves New York for LA after a break-up and falls in love while renting the guest house of a young father.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: When Sarah Goldman, a lovely young school teacher in Chicago, wants to please her parents, she invents a boyfriend whom she believes will be the man of her mother's dreams. When her parents insist on meeting the man, Sarah hires Bob, an actor, to pretend to be her "beau". The masquerade works flawlessly for a time and brings comic situations, but in the end, their lives are irrevocably changed.

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise
programme.desc: Ellie tends to the injured and cantankerous Jordan as he heals from a shoulder injury. Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Framed by my Fiance
programme.desc: Lawyer Daniel, youngest judge fiancee Jenny faces manslaughter charge.

programme.title: The Wrong Fiance
programme.desc: A photographer tries to get away from her nightmarish ex-fiance.

programme.title: Christi / Fred / Marla
programme.desc: A single mother is kidnapped, stabbed and left for dead.

programme.title: Framed for Murder
programme.desc: June, framed by her sister, spent 7 years in jail for a crime she didn't commit.

programme.title: Framed by my Fiance
programme.desc: Lawyer Daniel, youngest judge fiancee Jenny faces manslaughter charge.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Murders believed to be committed by a vampire turn out to be the work of a servant demon of Astaroth.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: When a teen aspiring to be a pop star disappears, her mom tracks her down, uncovering a sinister plot.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon tracks down her estranged sister she's elated to reunite—until she suspects that it's an impostor.

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: A couple is threatened when Jessica, the driver from their past accident, moves in next door seeking revenge.

programme.title: That's My Boy (2012)
programme.desc: A father moves in on the eve of his son's wedding and promptly begins feuding with the bride-to-be.

programme.title: That's My Boy (2012)
programme.desc: A father moves in on the eve of his son's wedding and promptly begins feuding with the bride-to-be.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: A professional boxer (Eddie Murphy) has to help a U.S. government agent recover a missing jet.

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: An estranged New York couple witnesses a murder and are placed in a witness-protection program in a small Wyoming town.

programme.title: The Southerner
programme.desc: The life of the poor Tucker family, that worked as cotton pluggers and decided to get their own ground, but nature is against them.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 48, 49
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: No Killing Without Dollars
programme.desc: Lawrence White returns to Owell Rock seeking revenge for his father's murder. To protect his identity and strategy, he adopts a new name and hires another man to impersonate Lawrence White, setting a dangerous game of deception and vengeance in motion.

programme.title: Secret of Captain O'Hara
programme.desc: Captain O'Hara saves Mary from Navajo warriors and brings her safely to Fort San Antonio. But her fiancé, Major Brooks, is not only O'Hara's rival but also a ruthless enemy of the Native tribes. As tensions rise, O'Hara must fight for peace while facing personal betrayal and growing conflict.

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: Catch Us If You Can
programme.desc: A free-wheeling, skylarking film about the attempted escape of two youngsters from the fiercely artificial world in which they have become trapped. Steve and his four friends - Lenny, Mike, Rick and Dennis - manage to persuade Dinah, symbol of a nationwide 'Eat Meat' advertising campaign, to escape from the false values of the commercial world.

programme.title: Band Waggon
programme.desc: After being evicted from BBC Broadcasting House, Arthur (Arthur Askey) and his friend Stinker move to a castle where they come upon television equipment which they use to put on a show - not realising that it is in use by German agents.

programme.title: A Cottage to Let
programme.desc: A military inventor is unaware he is under the watchful gaze of spies during World War II.

programme.title: Black Orchid
programme.desc: When John falls in love with his wife's sister he asks his wife for a divorce. Their plans are ruined when it is revealed that it is illegal for him to marry his divorced wife's sister. When she suddenly dies it looks suspiciously like murder.

programme.title: Passport to Shame
programme.desc: When the innocent-faced Malou, having been framed with a crime in Paris, arrives at a sordid brothel in England, it seems that she is condemned to a miserable and soul-destroying life...

programme.title: Last Film
programme.desc: Afterward, "Sang-min" embarks on a journey with "Man-bok," experiencing events that blur the lines between dream and reality. The ultimate film they always wanted to create becomes their last reel.At a provincial university's film and theater department, Park Sang-min, who teaches film, is also a film director. In the midst of this crisis, loan shark Man-bok approaches Sang-min and proposes a deal: if Sang-min makes a film about Man-bok's life, Man-bok will help him pay off his debt. Sang-min accepts the offer, and as they work Sang-min accumulated a significant amount of debt while making movies, eventually coming under threat from loan sharks.

programme.title: Springtime
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: Once in a summer
programme.desc: Su-jin, a writer of the TV program, go searching for ‘SEO Jung-in', the first love of professor YOON Seok-young.

programme.title: My Paparotti
programme.desc: Story about a gangster who wants to be a tenor singer in South Korea.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Dimension Slip
programme.desc: Kate, a troubled young women wakes up in a parallel dimension and assumes her double's identity in order to solve her attempted murder.

programme.title: KIN
programme.desc: KIN, a pulse-pounding crime thriller with a sci-fi twist, is the story of an unexpected hero destined for greatness. Chased by a vengeful criminal and a gang of otherworldly soldiers, a recently released ex-con and his adopted teenage brother are forced to go on the run with a weapon...

programme.title: Christmas Confessions
programme.desc: (2015) Romance with Sarah Lancaster. When an out-of-work actress returns to her hometown for Christmas after a decade away, she finds love and friendship. Will she see what's truly important in life?

programme.title: Christmas in Toyland
programme.desc: (2022) Festive rom-com with Vanessa Lengies. Data analyst Charlie is sent to a thriving toy shop to replicate its formula. Can manager Grant's secrets to success open her mind... and heart?

programme.title: Christmas Festival Of Ice
programme.desc: (2017) Heart-melting romance with Taylor Cole. A woman determined to keep an annual ice sculpture competition going enlists a charming local artist to help. But will she carve out some time for love?

programme.title: Her Magical Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Seasonal drama with Jessica Lowndes. Heartbroken at Christmas, a woman loses her sparkle until magical ornaments sent by her mother help bring her hope, courage and maybe a touch of new love.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: (2021) Deck the halls with Natalie Dreyfuss. When a workaholic executive hires a festive fixer for his family's company Christmas party, sparks fly, ornaments drop and love comes down the chimney.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Gridiron Gang
programme.desc: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson (The Rundown, Walking Tall) stars in this gritty and inspirational movie, based on a true story about a group of teenage delinquents given a second chance to redeem themselves by playing football.

programme.title: Christine
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Stephen King, CHRISTINE tells the horrific story of a 1957 Plymouth that is bought by a misfit student (Keith Gordon) and refurbished, and takes on human characteristics. Christine, as the Plymouth is called, exacts revenge on everyone who treated her owner badly at school and then gets even more possessive and goes after Gordon's girlfriend.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they 'll get away with the perfect heist. They 're wrong.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Drawn from true-life events, it takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites.

programme.title: The Believer
programme.desc: Ryan Gosling stars in the true story of an anti-Semitic skinhead who was revealed to be Jewish by a New York Times reporter.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: The Siege
programme.desc: Walker, an international assassin, is compromised during a mission. His handler sends him to a Reassignment Center at which Walker will be processed for a new identity. During his stay at the facility, a ruthless assault team storms the compound searching for someone their boss has lost.

programme.title: Conan The Barbarian
programme.desc: The most legendary Barbarian of all time is back. A quest that begins as a personal vendetta for the fierce Cimmerian warrior soon turns into an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as Conan realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria.
